TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_mahmuwac_tu_hata, title = mahmuwac_tu_hata, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/mahmuwac_tu_hata} }

S.FORM: mahmuwac tu hata 升旗 nasulitan nay paybalucu'ay a kawaw nu subana'ay a pu 2018-1, nasulitan ni Tuku Sayun
S.PHON: maħmuwaʦ tu ħata ** nasur~ɾitan naj pajbar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡaj a kawaw nu subanaʔ~ʡaj a pu ****-*, nasur~ɾitan ni tuku sajun

S.PHON: maħmuwaʦ tu ħata ** nasur~ɾitan naj pajbar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡaj a kawaw nu subanaʔ~ʡaj a pu ****-*, nasur~ɾitan ni tuku sajun
